Package neqsim.process.equipment.distillation

Class DistillationColumn.ShortcutInitializationResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.distillation.DistillationColumn.ShortcutInitializationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
DistillationColumn
public static class DistillationColumn.ShortcutInitializationResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result from initializing a rigorous column with shortcut FUG design estimates.

The result records the Fenske-Underwood-Gilliland estimates and the translated rigorous-column settings applied to DistillationColumn: total stage count, bottom-up feed tray and condenser reflux ratio.

Version:
1.0
Author:
esol

  • Constructor Details

    • ShortcutInitializationResult

      public ShortcutInitializationResult(boolean initialized, int totalStageCount, int feedTrayNumber, int feedTrayNumberFromTop, double minimumStages, double minimumRefluxRatio, double actualStages, double actualRefluxRatio, double condenserDuty, double reboilerDuty, String lightKey, String heavyKey, String message)
      Create a shortcut initialization result.
      Parameters:
      initialized - whether the rigorous column was configured
      totalStageCount - total rigorous stage count including condenser/reboiler if present
      feedTrayNumber - bottom-up rigorous feed tray index
      feedTrayNumberFromTop - shortcut feed tray count from the top product end
      minimumStages - Fenske minimum theoretical stages
      minimumRefluxRatio - Underwood minimum reflux ratio
      actualStages - Gilliland actual theoretical stages
      actualRefluxRatio - selected actual reflux ratio
      condenserDuty - estimated condenser duty in W
      reboilerDuty - estimated reboiler duty in W
      lightKey - light-key component name
      heavyKey - heavy-key component name
      message - diagnostic message

  • Method Details

    • isInitialized

      public boolean isInitialized()
      Check whether initialization succeeded.
      Returns:
      true when shortcut estimates were applied to the rigorous column

    • getTotalStageCount

      public int getTotalStageCount()
      Get the applied total stage count.
      Returns:
